Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My head is getting clearer...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel someone's presence beside me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Thank goodness. You finally woke up...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Oh, this is Tatsumi Memorial Hospital. It's just a short walk from the station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Thank goodness. You finally woke up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}The doctor couldn't find anything wrong. He said you were just exhausted...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I'm sorry I wasn't helpful at all back there...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}But, wow. That power of yours was really something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}They're what we're fighting against.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}And that power you used... We call it "Persona."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Don't worry, we'll explain everything later. I'm sorry I didn't tell you before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}That power you used... We call it "Persona."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}And those creatures you defeated are Shadows—our enemies.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}We'll explain everything later. I'm sorry I didn't tell you before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I wanted to tell you something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I can kinda relate. To you, I mean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}My dad died in an accident when I was little...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}And my mom and I aren't exactly on good terms...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}You're all alone too, aren't you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}To be honest, I already heard about your past...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}But it didn't seem fair, so I wanted you to know about mine too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}There was a big explosion in the area.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Supposedly, my dad died in the blast, but nobody really knows what happened...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}At the time, he was working in a lab run by the Kirijo Group.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}So I'm hoping if I stick around long enough, I'll find out more about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}That's why I'm going to Gekkoukan High, and why I was there when this happened to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Not that I was much help... I kinda panicked. That was my first time facing them, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Sorry... You wouldn't have to go through all this if I weren't such a coward...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Sorry for telling you all this the minute you opened your eyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}While I was waiting, I thought to myself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}"I've been hiding so many things from him... As soon as he wakes up, I'll tell him the truth."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}So, thanks for listening. I've been wanting to share that story with someone for a long time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Sorry for telling you all this the minute you opened your eyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}While I was waiting, I thought to myself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}"I've been hiding so many things from him. As soon as he wakes up, I'll tell him the truth."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}So, thanks for listening. I've been wanting to share that story with someone for a long time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}All right, I'm gonna get going.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}I'll let the others know you're okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}They said you could leave once you regained consciousness, so I think you're free to go home.[n]{f 1 1}
